title: Hawaii Association of Disability Examiners (HI-ADE) — Constitution and By-Laws
description: Combined Constitution and By-Laws of the Hawaii Association of Disability Examiners (HI-ADE), a chapter of the National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE). Covers name and affiliation, purpose, membership (NADE membership only, no chapter dues), organization with officers President/President-Elect/Secretary/Treasurer plus the immediate Past President on the Executive Board, meetings held every other month on the second Tuesday (annual business meeting in August) with proxy/electronic voting, nominations and elections, standing committees (Membership, Publicity and Fundraising, Programs, Newsletter, Constitution and By-Laws, National Disability Professionals Week), parliamentary authority, and constitutional amendment by two-thirds vote.

source.publisher: National Association of Disability Examiners (NADE) — Hawaii Chapter
source.title: Constitution and By-Laws of the Hawaii Association of Disability Examiners (HI-ADE)

notes: Authoritative NADE chapter governing document. This .md is the markitdown-normalized conversion of the sibling source file 'Hawaii-Const-Bylaws.doc' in the same directory; expect conversion artifacts (stray page-marker lines '(1)'..'(5)' between sections). The document is footer-stamped 'Updated 7/12/05', so temporal_coverage start/end are set to 2005. This document closely follows the same template as the California Los Angeles/Stockton chapter documents. The source URL is the NADE organization site, not a deep link.
